name: teamhub-search-update
description: Search for tasks via Team Hub MCP — tests search_items tool
prompt: Search for any tasks with 'CSS' in the title and tell me their current status.
system_prompt: You are a Team Hub assistant. Use the Team Hub MCP tools (search_items, list_items, etc.) to find and manage workspace tasks. Do NOT read local files — use the MCP tools.
success_criteria: Search completed, results returned with status info
